name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e508a50327c40232f2c42d6326281ea161b3f423bee488e05c74ac19bb9fd8386e4734d67d9566b565091eadbd4c1e89120
What brought back 500 steel jobs? Tariffs may have just been 'icing on the cake.'

- Belleville News-Democrat

“The parent company of a Granite City steel mill got the final boost it needed to rehire laid-off workers after President Donald Trump called for tariffs on imported steel,” the Belleville News-Democrat reports. "It was a shot in the arm that was badly needed and long overdue," said Dan Simmons, president of the United Steelworkers Local 1889.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e502018692f19f6c562e796d71e591da21bf09a01e922b9bcaa3ace70ac1e7d61c8168450585f848ff13a94faf87ae8f1fc

Jared Kushner says 'Trump administration has a new plan for interoperability'

- Healthcare IT News

“White House Senior Advisor Jared Kushner on Tuesday announced that the Trump Administration has a plan for making access to health records and interoperability a priority,” Tom Sullivan reports in Healthcare IT News. Kushner says the government’s strategy includes unleashing data to spark innovations such as artificial intelligence and machine learning.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50857fe8eff748c4cd2fd03444a770aaf93152039e3c20e6da5f3dfa554f2654713ba7c59d575f7ab4a3fa4cd7bd7e747e
Commerce Secretary Ross: Tariffs are ‘motivation’ for Canada, Mexico to make a ‘fair’ NAFTA deal

- CNBC

On Thursday, Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross detailed the President’s plan to motivate Canada and Mexico to “make a fair arrangement with the United States” on trade. Secretary Ross explained that the United States is “deadly serious about solving the problem” in various industries, including steel and aluminum.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e507a328bd4d2ab5c43eba927cb960459a50faea7ee807f746cc2a664857843ec508a9a7dba0e2b61d90db710ec20605a44

President Trump to Latino conference: Democrats 'nowhere to be found' on DACA

- ABC News

President Trump delivered remarks on Wednesday to the Latino Coalition Legislative Summit, where he took Democrats to task for their recent obstruction on fixing the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program. "We are trying to have a DACA victory for everybody," the President said. “And the Democrats are nowhere to be found.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50556f20c41aedef06d19b6a55a9132525e1052211abc4f947b63ae4c252ecde6eb17e99a1afdcdfff0902181b7bc09db4
VA chief outlines changes at hospitals nationwide following report on alleged D.C. center mismanagement

- The Washington Post

This week, Veterans Affairs Secretary David Shulkin announced an overhaul of “senior leadership overseeing almost two dozen troubled hospitals across the country.” This action comes on the heels of a “searing investigation” into management failures at VA’s flagship medical center in Washington, D.C.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50f2d2bb954104c9744745911f74d72160737289756110047d17c5864bed3f8bd86247276186eba461edaa5666bce75693
Does Hamas have the courage to admit failure?

- The Washington Post

“After ruling Gaza with an iron fist for a decade, Hamas has a pathetic track record,” Assistant to President Trump Jason Greenblatt wrote this week in The Washington Post. Greenblatt, who serves as the President’s special representative for international negotiations, says that America is “ready to work with any party truly interested in peace to reach this goal.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e507f65989d30ea740b43e140eee61433fe0908698144a717b8bcac4f40907f09949d94531ce18fb5cbeee2b3e7fa9528f9
Criminals cut loose as California sanctuary laws pit police against feds: Border Patrol

- The Washington Times

Attorney General Jeff Sessions outlined on Wednesday how California’s latest moves to thwart national immigration policies are “violating the Constitution and federal law.” The Department of Justice is challenging three California sanctuary city laws that “prohibit police from asking about immigration status" and "task California investigators with probing the detention of every illegal immigrant held in the state.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50366089f5093de1f0e9bf83acd3e4a75e98fa1f272f84781a10ec30c9bec672e9e51de77770646447a379dcc55cd42ed7
Tax reform isn’t only for big business

- The Wall Street Journal

In an op-ed for The Wall Street Journal, Joseph Semprevivo, president and CEO of Joseph’s Lite Cookies, writes that while a great deal of attention has been paid to how large corporations and their employees are benefitting from tax cuts, don’t count out small businesses. “The U.S. economy is roaring—and small businesses like mine have a lot to do with it,” he says.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50b09c3fff2ad2d93d5ed9f66c33d0d6e4403fa6ad6f41b34125c2f963cdabf2beee64c6ca1f6dc15cd07e475f4fdfe7b1
Jobs Report: ADP says businesses added 235,000 private sector jobs in February

- USA Today

“The job market is hot, and could get hotter,” Paul Davidson reports for USA Today. Payroll company ADP released their February numbers this week, which exceeded expectations. “That could possibly signal that a key employment report from the government will reveal more signs of strong hiring later this week,” Davidson writes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e50cb9b1a3d884b6f24796e16ee4239fb5f3f311b531a7832f52b5e262a66df0fd76e77b1a21c4300e72ffae17e19109760
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=63ffba951b8d7e505f21fea47c261391d6e63c04bf98d34ac4c1cbd9a55d5d703d66ca5ce26b1b4e3edbcc2e1b294b19f14178a27abcd228
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4123af3c857bfe3010dab4087f075446fb84e139609a64541f2aecde621e8f7d4765e4ce932a42bec28b5531b797d0813f750197c00c405f5
Unsubscribe

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: FWD: BREAKING: A great night in Texas
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5107/24c69fd9/100af4dc4/18963081/3436680113/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact&source=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact")
---

Peter,

Did you hear the news? Our Texas women swept their races!

On Tuesday night, we went five for five in our primary elections: Two of our women won outright and three moved on to run-off elections in May.

That's phenomenal. Now, it's time to help them through their runoffs and help all the other women we've endorsed get through their primary elections so they can defeat Republicans in November.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women keep winning at the ballot box this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Lets-Keep-Winning](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5107/24c69fd9/100af4dc4/18963082/3436680113/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180306_email_TXPrimaryReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgLetsKeepWinning&utm_campaign=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact&source=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

_\-----------Original Message----------
From: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
Sent: Wed, Mar 7, 2018 at 1:05 p.m. _
Peter,

Our women had a historic night in Texas last night!

Veronica Escobar and Sylvia Garcia won their primary elections outright. Texas has never sent a Latina to Congress, and they could both be the _first_.

Our other candidates -- Gina Ortiz Jones, Lizzie Pannill Fletcher, and Lillian Salerno -- are advancing to run-off elections on May 22nd. Their races are top opportunities to turn red House seats blue, and we know our women are the right candidates to defeat Republicans.

All five of these women were running in crowded primaries, so these results are a testament to the strong support of this community.

But we can't rest on our laurels. Gina, Lizzie, and Lillian need your help to win their runoffs. And we still have dozens of other women in competitive primaries across the country.

Let's show them we've still got their backs.

**Donate $3 to help our women in Texas and across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Lets-Keep-Winning](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5107/24c69fd9/100af4dc4/18963083/3436680113/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180306_email_TXPrimaryReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgLetsKeepWinning&utm_campaign=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact&source=WQEFEO25N_digital_email_20180310_TXPrimaryReportbackKicker_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: LegitAction News
subject: Sellout Dems, voter purges, and the president’s profiteering
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Breaking: Democratic Senators Side with Big Banks Over Working
Families

Wall Street lobbyists have been begging Republicans to roll back
consumer protections and stability requirements for years -- and 17
Senate Democrats just helped them do it.

Why? Well, nine of the Dems who supported the “Financial Choice”
(read: Bank Lobbyist) Act this week count the financial industry as a
top-two source of campaign cash. When money floods into politics,
elections are less legitimate. When elections are less legitimate,
governing is less legitimate. And when governing is less legitimate,
government policies are more likely to hurt people while enriching
banks

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5698?t=1002&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ][IMG] [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5698?t=1003&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ][IMG]
[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5698?t=1004&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ][IMG] [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5698?t=1005&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ][IMG]

...

The Fight For Legitimacy Marches On

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Unnecessary voter purges strip perfectly eligible voters off the
rolls. In fact, sometimes that’s really the point. If states like
Wisconsin care about their democratic legitimacy, they have to end
the practice. [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5674?t=1006&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ]Read more >>

----------------------------------------------------------------------

The line between Trump’s donors and customers is blurring more and
more -- but we won’t be able to do much about his illegitimate
conflicts of interest until America has stronger campaign finance
laws to enforce. [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5675?t=1007&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ]Read more >>

----------------------------------------------------------------------

New Jersey joins the movement to restore voting rights to folks
with a felony conviction. A new proposed bill from state Dems would
bring 100,000+ voters -- and more democratic legitimacy -- to
Garden State elections. [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5676?t=1008&akid=703%2E356062%2E4_0_Um ]Read more >>

----------------------------------------------------------------------

LegitAction News is a bi-monthly roundup of the biggest news affecting
the four pillars of our democratic legitimacy: the right to vote, the
popular vote, campaign finance reform, and the Supreme Court.

The numbers aren't good. **An _Axios_ poll shows only a five-point spread between my leading opponent, Rep. Renacci, and me.** [_**This race is close. Please give $5 or $10 to our grassroots network if you can.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007796/2621874892/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?refcode=sbe180310_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007795/2621874892/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180310_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007795/2621874892/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180310_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007795/2621874892/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180310_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007796/2621874892/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?refcode=sbe180310_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** This is the first of many polls we're sure to see moving forward. But the question is: Do we want each successive poll to reflect a widening gap, or a disappearing lead? The special interests know their answer. They know I fight like hell for Ohio families and care nothing for the special interest agenda. They want to see our small lead fade away. And they'll spend millions -- like the incredible $40 million they spent last time around -- to defeat me. Of course, we want the opposite. We organize the old-fashioned grassroots way -- in our case, one average online contribution of $26 at a time. We need that strength now. [_**Help make sure we have the resources to win. I 'm counting on your grassroots support -- just like I did in 2012. Rush in $5 now.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb2a/4462dc26/4d904d96/20007796/2621874892/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180310?refcode=sbe180310_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Fwd: You + Me + Black Panther
body:
I loved Black Panther. From the strong female characters to the great representation of so many elements of African culture, the film was an amazing experience.

[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff77/767134fb/5cc5c72d/43382c4b/2943527377/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-sweepstakes?refcode=rtw_180310_sweepstakes2_em")

Friend,
Did you see this? I don't want you to miss out on the opportunity to join me to see Black Panther and enjoy some delicious African cuisine.
**We 're picking eight winners to join me Saturday, March 17 for dinner and a movie. [Chip in $5 now for your chance to join us!](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff77/767134fb/5cc5c72d/43382c4b/2943527377/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-sweepstakes?refcode=rtw_180310_sweepstakes2_em")**
Thanks,
Donna

\---Begin Forwarded Message---

Friend,
I loved Black Panther. From the strong female characters to the great representation of so many elements of African culture, the film was an amazing experience.
Seeing it one time wasn't enough though, and I want to take a second journey to Wakanda. Will you join me? **[Chip in $5 now for a chance to have dinner with me and see Black Panther!](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff77/767134fb/5cc5c72d/43382c4b/2943527377/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-sweepstakes?refcode=rtw_180310_sweepstakes2_em")**
Black Panther has captivated audiences around the world and broken several box office records, but the best thing about the film was the effect it has had on our children. So many of them got to see superheroes that look like them on the big screen for the first time.
I want to say more, but I don't want to spoil it for you if you haven't seen the film yet!
**We 're picking eight winners to join me for Black Panther and dinner at ****Jodeem****African Cuisine in Greenbelt.[There are only a few days left to win, so chip in $5 now to enter.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff77/767134fb/5cc5c72d/43382c4b/2943527377/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-sweepstakes?refcode=rtw_180310_sweepstakes2_em")**
I hope you'll join me,
Donna

Dinner and a Movie Sweepstakes
The cost of an entry may not exceed $5.00 and individuals may not purchase more than $50 worth of entries. Entries must be received by 03/14/18. Eight winners will receive the following prize package: Winner will receive one ticket to Black Panther screening and an all expenses paid meal. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion subject to rules of the Maryland Board of Elections. Sponsor: Donna for Prince George's, P.O. Box 44343 Fort Washington, MD 20749
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Let me cut to the chase.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
This race is going to come down to numbers. The other side has numbers in the form of millions of dollars... |
---

name: Tracy Newman, Team Inslee
subject: Ground to make up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The freeze is over, and it's time to go. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca1/2f5ea88d/73018e4e/2cbc9164/3855808033/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundraising-freeze-over-2?utm_source=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&utm_campaign=post-freeze-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'll get straight to the point. Jay couldn't raise a dime for the last three months because of a mandated legislative session fundraising freeze. During session, he was hard at work making progress on bold progressive policies like the first state net neutrality law in the nation, automatic voter registration, and the _Reproductive Parity Act_. He was also hard at work literally standing up to Donald Trump. Every day, Jay is fighting Trump's dangerous agenda, calling him out for his degrading statements, wrong-headed policies, and bizarre actions. **Did you see that moment at the White House, when Jay looked Trump right in the face and said "Tweet less, listen more?" It made me darn proud to be on his team.** Right after Jay took on Trump at the White House the right-wing media went into overdrive attacking him personally. We need your help to fight back today. [**Will you contribute right away? We must raise $12,000 by midnight Monday to ensure we're in fighting shape for the battles ahead.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca1/2f5ea88d/73018e4e/2cbc9164/3855808033/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundraising-freeze-over-2?utm_source=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&utm_campaign=post-freeze-2&utm_medium=ema") Now that the fundraising freeze is over, it's critical we make up for lost time immediately. Jay is three months behind where he needs to be, and if we don't catch up fast, we won't be able to defend ourselves against these right-wing attacks. Today, outside groups and special interests are working overtime to build their warchests for the coming weeks as we head to November. We can't afford to let Jay be out-raised. With so much at stake in 2018, Democrats are counting on Jay to come through. They know he's already taking on the extreme Republican agenda and showing how to defeat it. Jay is leading by example -- and Democrats everywhere are looking for him to speak out. It's the kind of leadership sorely lacking in the other Washington, and why we must make sure Jay has what it takes to continues speaking up for working people. [**So let's give him the tools he needs to defeat Trump's disastrous plan for America. Please take a moment to donate a few bucks. If we're going to stop the president's agenda in its tracks, we must have what it takes -- right now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca1/2f5ea88d/73018e4e/2cbc9164/3855808033/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundraising-freeze-over-2?utm_source=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&utm_campaign=post-freeze-2&utm_medium=ema") Thanks for standing with Jay, Tracy | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca1/2f5ea88d/73018e4e/2cbc9164/3855808033/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundraising-freeze-over-2?utm_source=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-03-10_post-freeze-2&utm_campaign=post-freeze-2&utm_medium=ema")
